languages.text: {n}Стоящие вокруг бойцы заметно напрягаются.{/n} "Согласно строкам священного Устава, если вы не назоветесь, мы открываем огонь на поражение".

traits.locale_text: {n}Стоящие вокруг бойцы заметно напрягаются.{/n} "Согласно строкам священного Устава, если вы не назоветесь, мы открываем огонь на поражение".
traits.speaker: JanurZarkovSergeant

languages.text: {n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Handbook, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."
languages.original_text: {n}Стоящие вокруг бойцы заметно напрягаются.{/n} "Согласно строкам священного Устава, если вы не назоветесь, мы открываем огонь на поражение".

traits.locale_text: {n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense up.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Code, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."
{n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Code, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."
{n}The soldier smirks and lazily makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment."
{n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense up.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Code, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."

languages.text: {n}兵士はニヤリと笑って、くろくろと鷲の紋章をなぞる。{/n}「ジャヌール・バトシュスキー中尉、32番メロフ連隊3番補給中隊」
languages.original_text: {n}The soldier smirks and lazily makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment."

languages.text: {n}Etrafını saran askerler, gözler görülür şekilde geriliyor.{/n} "Kutsal El Kitabı'nın ilkeleri uyarınca kendinizi tanıtmazsanız ateş açacağız!"
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Handbook, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."

traits.locale_text: {n}Etrafını saran askerler, gözler görülür şekilde geriliyor.{/n} "Kutsal El Kitabı'nın ilkeleri uyarınca kendinizi tanıtmazsanız ateş açacağız!"

languages.text: {n}围住你们的士兵们明显紧张了起来。{/n}“根据《神圣手册》的规定，若你们拒绝表明身份，我们就会开火。”
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Handbook, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."

traits.locale_text: {n}围住你们的士兵们明显紧张了起来。{/n}“根据《神圣手册》的规定，若你们拒绝表明身份，我们就会开火。”

languages.text: {n}Die Soldaten um dich herum erstarren.{/n} "Gemäß der Grundsätze des Heiligen Handbuchs eröffnen wir das Feuer, wenn Ihr Euch nicht identifiziert."
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Handbook, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Soldaten um dich herum erstarren.{/n} "Gemäß der Grundsätze des Heiligen Handbuchs eröffnen wir das Feuer, wenn Ihr Euch nicht identifiziert."

languages.text: {n}Les soldats qui vous entourent se crispent.{/n} « Conformément aux préconisations du Manuel Sacré, si vous refusez d'obtempérer, nous sommes tenus d'ouvrir le feu. »
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Handbook, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."

traits.locale_text: {n}Les soldats qui vous entourent se crispent.{/n} « Conformément aux préconisations du Manuel Sacré, si vous refusez d'obtempérer, nous sommes tenus d'ouvrir le feu. »

languages.text: {n}Los soldados que te rodean se ponen en tensión.{/n} «De acuerdo con los principios del manual sagrado, si no se identifican, abriremos fuego».
languages.original_text: {n}The soldiers surrounding you visibly tense.{/n} "As per the tenets of the Holy Handbook, if you fail to identify yourselves, we open fire."
